message:
audit: batch 475 — load_balance, timer/driver, raptorq/decoder, service/buffer all SOUND

load_balance.rs (1919L): SWRR, RoundRobin, P2C all correct.
time/driver.rs (1943L): collect-expired-then-wake deadlock prevention.
raptorq/decoder.rs (4961L): guarded unwraps, no unsafe.
service/buffer.rs (1500L): waker dedup, pending counter cleanup.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
